DEPT 6, JUDGE CONWAY, JPOND, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ARNOLD EVJE II APPEARING FOR PLTF, ALSO PRESENT IS PROPERTY MANAGER VICTORIA MCCARTHY. THIS CASE WILL STAY ON THE TRIAL CALENDAR 12/2/96 FOR DEFT PAUL LEHR. IF CASE IS SETTLED, PLTF'S COUNSEL WILL TAKE CASE OFF CALENDAR.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CERRA, RON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 250 TAYLOR STREET #208, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,450.00 RENT, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,675.00, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMNT AS TO DFT CERRA ONLY; DISMISSL FILED AS TO DFT LEHR. PLTF WVS ATNYS FEES. DFT TO RETURN KEYS ON/BEFORE 12-31-96 & LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM-CLEAN CONDITION. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED.
